response.title: Financial Analyst
response.description: Alpha Financial Solutions is seeking a skilled Financial Analyst to join our dynamic finance team. The ideal candidate will analyze financial data, prepare reports, and assist in forecasting and budgeting processes. This role is key to providing insights that drive our strategic decisions. If you have a passion for finance and a keen analytical mindset, we want you on our team.

required_skills: Advanced proficiency in Excel (including pivot tables and macros)
Experience with financial reporting tools (e.g., SAP, Oracle)
Knowledge of financial regulations and compliance
preferred_skills: Experience with data visualization tools (e.g., Tableau, Power BI)
requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, or related field.
